```python
import pytest

from your_module import fizzbuzz


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "n, expected",
    [
        (1, "1"),
        (2, "2"),
        (3, "Fizz"),
        (5, "Buzz"),
        (15, "FizzBuzz"),
        (30, "FizzBuzz"),
        (9, "Fizz"),
        (10, "Buzz"),
    ],
)
def test_fizzbuzz_happy_path(n, expected):
    assert fizzbuzz(n) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "n, expected",
    [
        (0, "FizzBuzz"),   # divisible by 15
        (-3, "Fizz"),
        (-5, "Buzz"),
        (-15, "FizzBuzz"),
        (-1, "-1"),
    ],
)
def test_fizzbuzz_edge_cases(n, expected):
    assert fizzbuzz(n) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize("n", ["3", None, 3.14, [], {}])
def test_fizzbuzz_invalid_types_raise_type_error(n):
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        fizzbuzz(n)
```
